hero.title: Welcome to Agrogo
hero.subtitle: Smart solutions for modern agriculture
hero.slide3Text: From study to implementation — we support you at every step.

about.intro: Agrogo is a leading technology company specializing in the development of smart, integrated solutions that combine Internet of Things (IoT), electromechanical systems, and web and mobile applications to address critical challenges in key sectors such as agriculture, water management, energy, and the environment. At AGROGO, we merge engineering, software development, and environmental innovation to deliver modern products and services that help individuals and organizations improve operational efficiency and make data-driven decisions.
about.product1: Smart irrigation and watering system based on IoT technology
about.service1: Maintenance and installation of smart irrigation (IoT)
about.service2: Installation and maintenance of solar pumping system

services.card1Text: Agricultural projects: irrigation, production, solar energy
services.card2Text: Irrigation systems, solar pumping solutions, and IoT integration
services.card3Text: Advanced farming techniques using IoT and data analytics
services.card4Text: Comprehensive management solutions for green spaces

products.sensorsText: Weather stations, soil sensors, and environmental monitoring devices
products.controllersText: Smart controllers for automated irrigation management
products.webappText: Comprehensive web application for farm management
products.miniText: An irrigation device installed in the garden and linked with a mobile application, allowing you to control and monitor the irrigation process remotely.
products.proIntro: An irrigation device installed in farms, allowing farmers through mobile or laptop application to get:
products.pro1Text: Gives irrigation schedules, saving water while keeping crops healthier.
products.pro2Text: Optimizes water use to reduce needless waste.
products.pro3Text: Control watering from anywhere with the easy-to-use app.

platform.intro: Agrilogy platform is a smart web application for irrigation and fertilization management. It collects sensor data and transforms it into accurate indicators to support better decision-making.
platform.feature1: Real-time monitoring of soil and climate conditions
platform.feature2: Scheduling and management of irrigation and fertilization based on scientific standards
platform.feature3: Smart alerts when action is needed or risks are detected
platform.feature4: Remote control of pumps and irrigation systems
platform.benefit1: Water and fertilizer consumption analysis to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
platform.benefit2: With the integration of IoT and Artificial Intelligence, we help you achieve more productive and sustainable farming.

platformFeatures.f1Caption: Monitor your farm data in real time with live charts and indicators.
platformFeatures.f2Caption: Build dashboards that fit your workflow and key metrics.
platformFeatures.f3Caption: Get notified when thresholds are reached or action is needed.
platformFeatures.f4Caption: Integrate all your data sources and analyze historical trends.
platformFeatures.f5Caption: Manage roles, teams, and access across your organization.
platformFeatures.f6Caption: Customize the platform to provide a unified, branded experience for your precision agriculture applications.

industry.intro: We are committed to supporting you at every stage of your project, from study and design to manufacturing and implementation. With our multidisciplinary expertise, we develop advanced, functional prototypes that integrate cutting-edge technologies, customized to meet your specific needs.
industry.studyText: Comprehensive project analysis and innovative design solutions
industry.teamLine: At Agrogo, our team unites diverse expertise to deliver innovative, tailored solutions for your needs.
industry.iot1: Design and deployment of IoT-based solutions
industry.iot6: Maintenance and troubleshooting of IoT networks

equipment.card1Title: Enhancing Water Management in Agriculture with AGRILOGY Weather Stations
equipment.card1Text: Because of climate change in agriculture, we need to know how much water plants need. The AGRILOGY weather stations allow us to know farm water needs precisely, helping optimize irrigation schedules and resource management.
equipment.card2Title: Optimizing Irrigation Processes and Resource Efficiency with Agrilogy Sensors
equipment.card2Text: For the success of the irrigation process without wasting resources and water, Agrilogy sensors monitor soil changes and development, providing important information for successful agriculture.
equipment.card2Features: Features: Better management of water and effective management of fertilizers.

partners.successText: Agrogo works with clients ranging from small-scale farmers to large agricultural enterprises, helping them streamline operations, improve efficiency, and consistently achieve higher crop yields through smarter, data-driven decisions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Do you have any questions about our projects, products, services or our site in general? Do you have any comments or ideas you would like to share with us? Please send us a message. We'd love to hear from you!
